# 18S Rrna Sequencing

**Summary**: A molecular technique used to identify and differentiate species based on the 18S ribosomal RNA gene.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] used 18S rRNA analysis to identify three specific microalgae strains (S1, S2, and S3).

## Key Results and Findings

- Three strains (S1, S2, and S3) identified through their morphological behavior and 18S rRNA analysis. ([[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016, p. 75]])
